description: Automated Detection of Inaccurate and Imprecise Transitions in MRM Mass Spectrometry
author: D. R. Mani, The Broad Institute
plan:
## AuDIT GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
AuDIT is a GenePattern module that Automated Detection of Inaccurate and Imprecise Transitions in MRM Mass Spectrometry

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 7 parameters:
- Required: data.file, skyline.export, pvalue.threshold, cv.threshold, all.pairs, output.intermediate.results, output.prefix
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
/build/audit/run_audit.sh <data.file> <output.prefix> <pvalue.threshold> <cv.threshold> <all.pairs> <skyline.export> <output.intermediate.results>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/audit\:0.4

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: data.file
parameters.description: input file with pre-processed MRM data in csv format

parameters.name: skyline.export
parameters.description: if "yes", data file is a Skyline csv export including following columns\: Sample (usually derived from SampleName, having identical value for all its replicates), PeptideSequence, ReplicateName, FragmentIon, PrecursorCharge, ProductCharge, light Area, heavy Area. When "no", input must contain sample, replicate, peptide, transition.id, area, IS.area in that order.

parameters.name: pvalue.threshold
parameters.description: p-value threshold above which transition is quantification-worthy. Must be a value between 0 and 1 inclusive.

parameters.name: cv.threshold
parameters.description: threshold for coefficient of variation below which transition is quantification-worthy

parameters.name: all.pairs
parameters.description: calculate all possible pairs of relative ratios for a transition

parameters.name: output.prefix
parameters.description: file name prefix used for output file(s)
